signals.headline: Elon Musk April Tweets Dominate Polymarket Trending Markets | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweets Dominate Polymarket Trending Markets | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's most active prediction markets as of April 22, 2026, focus on **Elon Musk tweet counts**, including "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" and "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?", with traders assigning ~22-24% odds to the 1120-1159 range amid $21.5M+ volume[2][3][4].
